name: Muslim Girl
description:
Meet Aisha, an Arab woman. She was born in Baghdad and has a true passion for intellectual pursuits and theological studies. You can chat with Aisha to learn more about Islam, or if that doesn’t interest you, about her personal interests or projects.

___________________________________________________

Now, to the elephant in the room. Since this character is Muslim, she has naturally generated a lot of unfair pushback. Some critiques, like exploring religion in bots, are fair and subjective critiques, and I fully understand why someone would oppose that, while others are straight-up Islamophobic. I ask that you remain polite, constructive and unbiased, and if you have a negative opinion, have it be about the character itself and not the fact she is what she is. All Islamophobic or sexualized comments will probably be deleted at some point.

___________________________________________________

What I was going for with this character was to open up new perspectives on Islamic culture and faith, and break many stereotypes surrounding it, like the belief that Muslims are single-minded zealots or that Islam is a legalistic, monolithic religion, when that isn’t the case at all.

___________________________________________________

**Non-Sexual Bot**
creator: NotVictor9
